problem_statement: Dispatch teams react late when rider demand, driver supply, weather, and local events move at the same time.
hypothesis: If operators receive city-zone supply gaps two hours earlier, completed trips rise while surge volatility decreases.
mvp_scope: Zone-level alert queue, incentive recommendation, dispatch note, and override reason capture.
north_star: Completed rides per active supply hour
guardrail: Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility
non_goal: Fully automated pricing changes without country operations approval.
stakeholders: Dispatch analytics, driver incentives, legal, country operations
acceptance_criteria: ["Marketplace operations lead can review the AI recommendation with a confidence label.", "The workflow captures an override reason before changing Ride hailing operations.", "The launch report shows Completed rides per active supply hour and Cancellation rate and driver earnings volatility by city cohort."]
risks: ["Model confidence may be misread as an automated decision.", "Country operations may need local policy or language changes.", "Sparse data in expansion markets may lower recommendation quality."]

problem_statement: Restaurants, couriers, and customers see ETA misses too late for useful recovery actions.
hypothesis: If high-risk orders are identified before courier pickup, support contacts and refund exposure decline.
mvp_scope: Order risk score, prep delay reason codes, courier escalation, and customer recovery message test.
guardrail: Refund rate and courier reassignment rate
non_goal: Changing restaurant ranking based only on model output.
stakeholders: Restaurant ops, courier ops, support, lifecycle messaging
acceptance_criteria: ["Delivery reliability PM can review the AI recommendation with a confidence label.", "The workflow captures an override reason before changing Food delivery operations.", "The launch report shows On-time delivered orders and Refund rate and courier reassignment rate by city cohort."]
risks: ["Model confidence may be misread as an automated decision.", "Country operations may need local policy or language changes.", "Sparse data in expansion markets may lower recommendation quality."]

problem_statement: Missing photos, out-of-stock items, unclear modifiers, and poor descriptions reduce conversion and increase order errors.

problem_statement: Drivers receive inconsistent signals about where and when work is likely to be profitable.
hypothesis: If partners can plan profitable supply hours, marketplace liquidity improves without creating unfair exposure.
mvp_scope: Earnings range, recommended zones, confidence label, and feedback capture from drivers.
north_star: Active partner hours in shortage zones
non_goal: Guaranteed earnings or automated deactivation decisions.
stakeholders: Partner product, marketplace, trust, policy, operations
acceptance_criteria: ["Driver supply lead can review the AI recommendation with a confidence label.", "The workflow captures an override reason before changing Partner supply operations.", "The launch report shows Active partner hours in shortage zones and Earnings variance by partner cohort by city cohort."]
risks: ["Model confidence may be misread as an automated decision.", "Country operations may need local policy or language changes.", "Sparse data in expansion markets may lower recommendation quality."]
